title: Pub/Sub
aim: To understand asynchronous messaging using Google Cloud Pub/Sub topics and subscriptions.

steps.description: Navigate to Pub/Sub > Topics in the Cloud Console.
From the topic's context menu (three dots), select 'Create subscription'.
Name the subscription 'MySub' and select 'Pull' as the delivery type.
Click 'Create' to establish the message queue.
Go to the 'Messages' tab of your 'MyTopic'.
Click 'Publish Message' and enter 'Hello World' in the message body.
Open Cloud Shell and pull the message from the subscription.
Verify that 'Hello World' appears in the Cloud Shell output.

viva.question: What is Pub/Sub?
viva.answer: An asynchronous messaging service that decouples services that produce events from services that process events.

viva.question: Push vs Pull delivery?
viva.answer: Push delivers messages to a webhook URL. Pull requires the subscriber to request messages from the service.

result: Successfully demonstrated the publisher-subscriber pattern using a topic and pull subscription.
conclusion: Learned how to decouple microservices using an asynchronous message bus.
